personas.name: Emma
personas.description: A university student experiencing stress and anxiety who uses the app for emotional support and coping strategies.
pain_points: Struggles to find accessible mental health support
Needs immediate emotional relief during stressful moments
context: Using the app during stressful academic periods
Accessing support late at night or during emotional distress
constraints: Responses must feel supportive and relevant

personas.name: Liam
personas.description: A working professional seeking meaningful AI-driven conversations for emotional support.
goals: Have meaningful and relevant conversations with the AI
pain_points: AI responses feel repetitive or robotic
Frustration when the AI ignores previous inputs
context: Using the app as a substitute for casual emotional support
Engaging in longer conversations expecting continuity

personas.name: Sophia
personas.description: A busy professional who relies on the app for quick and reliable mental health support throughout the day.
goals: Access the app quickly without interruptions
pain_points: App crashes or freezes during use
Loss of conversation history due to glitches
context: Using the app during short breaks
constraints: Data must not be lost during usage

personas.name: Noah
personas.description: A regular user exploring mental health tools who expects advanced and consistent app functionality.
goals: Have the app remember past conversations
Use structured features like coaching tools
context: Using the app regularly over long periods

personas.name: Aisha
personas.description: A non-native English speaker who faces accessibility and usability challenges when using the app.
goals: Use the app in her preferred language
Navigate the app easily without confusion
context: Using the app occasionally for support
Attempting to use features despite language barriers
constraints: Interface must be easy to understand
Support should not require complex onboarding
